mapper.sql: id, checkpoint_id, run_id, observation_key, observation_type, stage, CAST(sources_jsonb AS TEXT) AS sources_jsonb, CAST(data_jsonb AS TEXT) AS data_jsonb, confidence, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM observation WHERE run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, observation_key ASC
SELECT FROM observation WHERE checkpoint_id = #{checkpointId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, observation_key ASC
